Class BrokenConnectorHistoryExportAddon

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.exportdelete.BrokenConnectorHistoryExportAddon
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExportMyDataAddon
@Component public class BrokenConnectorHistoryExportAddon extends Object implements IExportMyDataAddon
Adds broken-EOD-connector information to the personal-data export (issue #30).

When a user exports their data to migrate to a personal instance, the regular export deliberately omits the historical prices of active securities, assuming they will be re-fetched from their EOD connector after re-import. That assumption fails when an active security's history connector no longer works — its prices would be lost permanently.

This addon detects such securities (connector retry budget exhausted, or the connector id is no longer a registered IFeedConnector) and:

  • writes a plain-text report listing them into the export ZIP, and
  • additionally exports their historyquote rows into gt_data.sql so the prices survive re-import.

  • Constructor Details

      public BrokenConnectorHistoryExportAddon()

  • Method Details

    • getZipTextEntries

      public Map<String,String> getZipTextEntries(User user)
      Description copied from interface: IExportMyDataAddon
      Additional plain-text documents to add to the export ZIP, keyed by ZIP entry name (the file name inside the archive, e.g. "broken_history_connectors.txt"). The value is the full UTF-8 text content of the entry.
      Specified by:
      getZipTextEntries in interface IExportMyDataAddon
      Parameters:
      user - the user whose data is being exported
      Returns:
      a map of entry name to text content; empty by default

    • getAdditionalExportQueries

      public List<AdditionalExportQuery> getAdditionalExportQueries(User user)
      Description copied from interface: IExportMyDataAddon
      Additional AdditionalExportQuerys whose rows are appended to gt_data.sql as INSERT statements. Executed after the regular ExportDefinition-driven export, so any parent rows the returned rows depend on (e.g. securitycurrency for historyquote) are already present.
      Specified by:
      getAdditionalExportQueries in interface IExportMyDataAddon
      Parameters:
      user - the user whose data is being exported
      Returns:
      the list of additional export queries; empty by default
